quality.completeness: High. Contains core mechanics, flavor, and source info.
quality.formatting_issues: Minor. The description includes raw markdown/link syntax that should be parsed or cleaned for a final presentation layer (e.g., "[_magic missile_](#magic-missile)", "[attunement](#section-attunement)").

special_abilities.name: Astral Projection/Travel
special_abilities.effect: Enter the astral plane along with everything worn and carried. Remain until an action is used to return to the previous plane.

recommendations: Standardize linking syntax if this data is intended for display.
Clarify if the 5th-level Magic Missile casting scales based on the number of stars remaining or if it is always 5th level.
